summary: Israeli air forces conducted strikes in southern Lebanon, while IDF troops were wounded by an explosive device in Jenin, West Bank. The United States disabled a third oil tanker attempting to breach the Gulf of Oman blockade. Multiple explosions were reported around Karaj and Alborz provinces in Iran.
key_points: Israeli Air Force carried out attacks on multiple targets in southern Lebanon, including the village of Maghdal Zone (Source: @New_security8200/201643).
An IDF officer was severely wounded and a non‑commissioned officer lightly wounded by an explosive device in Jenin, West Bank (Source: @manniefabian/58544).
The U.S. Central Command disabled the oil tanker M/T Jalveer (flag Guinea‑Bissau) in the Gulf of Oman after it attempted to breach the Iranian‑enforced blockade (Source: @VahidOnline/76209).
Explosions were reported near Karaj airport around 03:55‑04:00 local time, with multiple blasts heard in the surrounding area (Source: @kianmeli1/87913).
Video evidence showed an Israeli Air Force strike in southern Lebanon (Source: @yediotnews25/131175).
Two explosions were reported in Alborz province, specifically in the city of Karaj, with residents describing shaking homes (Source: @mamlekate/103673).
Iranian armed forces threatened a resolute response to any hostile U.S. action in the region (Source: @lelotsenzura/92852).

sections.executive_summary: Israeli Air Force struck targets in southern Lebanon, and IDF personnel were wounded by an explosive in Jenin. The United States sank a third oil tanker attempting to breach the Gulf of Oman blockade. Multiple explosions were reported around Karaj and Alborz provinces in Iran.

points: Two explosions were reported in Alborz province, specifically in Karaj, with residents describing homes shaking and hearing loud blasts between 03:45 and 04:04 local time (Source: @mamlekate/103673).
Additional explosions were reported near Karaj airport at 03:55‑04:00, with several blasts heard in the vicinity of the airport and surrounding neighborhoods (Source: @kianmeli1/87913).
A video posted showed an explosion in the vicinity of Karaj's Farvardin area at 03:39, with residents describing a strong tremor (Source: @mamlekate/103671).
Iranian armed forces issued a statement promising a determined response to any hostile U.S. action in the region (Source: @lelotsenzura/92852).
Israeli Air Force conducted strikes on multiple terror sites in southern Lebanon, including the village of Maghdal Zone (Source: @New_security8200/201643).
An IDF officer was severely wounded and a non‑commissioned officer lightly wounded when an explosive device detonated during an operation in Jenin, West Bank (Source: @manniefabian/58544).
A video posted by yediotnews25 documented an Israeli Air Force attack in southern Lebanon (Source: @yediotnews25/131175).
The IDF spokesperson confirmed that a bomb blast injured two soldiers in Jenin and that investigations are ongoing to determine the cause (Source: @idf_telegram/24290).
During an operational activity in Jenin, West Bank, a suspicious object exploded, wounding an IDF officer severely and a non‑commissioned officer lightly (Source: @manniefabian/58544).
The IDF reported the incident in Jenin and stated that the injured personnel were evacuated to a hospital for treatment (Source: @idf_telegram/24290).
No additional casualties or civilian impacts were reported in the Jenin incident (Source: @manniefabian/58544).
The military continues to probe the source of the explosive device that caused the injuries in Jenin (Source: @manniefabian/58544).
Israeli Air Force carried out airstrikes targeting positions in southern Lebanon, with reports of hits in the Maghdal Zone village (Source: @New_security8200/201643).
A video posted by yediotnews25 showed an Israeli airstrike in southern Lebanon, confirming operational activity in the area (Source: @yediotnews25/131175).
No casualties were detailed in the reports, but the strikes were described as targeting terrorist positions (Source: @New_security8200/201643).
The Israeli military has not released further details on the outcomes of the southern Lebanon strikes (Source: @yediotnews25/131175).

U.S. forces disabled the oil tanker M/T Jalveer (flag Guinea‑Bissau) in the Gulf of Oman after it attempted to breach the Iranian‑enforced blockade, marking the third such vessel this week (Source: @VahidOnline/76209).
The operation involved a U.S. aircraft firing two Hellfire missiles at the tanker's engine room (Source: @VahidOnline/76209).
Earlier in the week, U.S. forces also disabled two other tankers, M/T Marivex and M/T Settebello, attempting to violate the blockade (Source: @VahidOnline/76209).
Since the blockade began on 13 April, U.S. Central Command reports having disabled nine non‑compliant vessels and rerouted 135 compliant ships (Source: @VahidOnline/76209).

key_developments: Israeli Air Force struck multiple targets in southern Lebanon, including the village of Maghdal Zone (Source: @New_security8200/201643).
An IDF officer was severely wounded and a non‑commissioned officer lightly wounded by an explosive device in Jenin, West Bank (Source: @manniefabian/58544).
The United States disabled the oil tanker M/T Jalveer in the Gulf of Oman after it attempted to breach the Iranian blockade (Source: @VahidOnline/76209).
Two explosions were reported in Alborz province near Karaj, with residents describing homes shaking between 03:45 and 04:04 local time (Source: @mamlekate/103673).
Explosions were reported near Karaj airport at 03:55‑04:00, with several blasts heard in the vicinity (Source: @kianmeli1/87913).
Iranian armed forces warned of a determined response to any hostile U.S. action in the region (Source: @lelotsenzura/92852).
Video evidence posted by yediotnews25 documented an Israeli Air Force attack in southern Lebanon (Source: @yediotnews25/131175).
sections.threat_assessment: The region faces heightened risk of escalation as Israel continues air operations in southern Lebanon while confronting explosive threats in the West Bank. U.S. naval actions against oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman demonstrate a willingness to enforce maritime blockades, potentially provoking Iranian retaliation. Iranian statements indicate a readiness to respond militarily to any perceived U.S. aggression, adding to the volatile security environment.
sections.regional_response: Israel has maintained its operational tempo against perceived terrorist targets in Lebanon, while the IDF is addressing security incidents in the West Bank. The United States is actively interdicting vessels attempting to breach the Gulf of Oman blockade, signaling a hardening stance toward Iranian maritime activities. Iran's public threats suggest a possible escalation in asymmetric or conventional responses if U.S. actions persist.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of Iranian maritime movements in the Gulf of Oman should be intensified following the recent tanker interdictions. Continued surveillance of southern Lebanon is required to assess the impact of Israeli airstrikes on militant capabilities. Further investigation into the source of the explosions near Karaj and Alborz is needed to determine whether they are linked to internal sabotage or external action.
